title: Verify user can complete a three-step onboarding wizard

steps.expected: The wizard displays step 1 of 3 with a progress indicator

steps.action: Fill in the step 1 fields and click Next
steps.expected: Step 2 of 3 appears; the progress indicator advances

steps.action: Fill in the step 2 fields and click Next
steps.expected: Step 3 of 3 appears; the progress indicator advances again
The wizard closes and a success status message confirms onboarding completion
